summary: Full testing of Hujjah trivia game new features: 20 categories (10 free + 10 premium), premium lock UI, AI generator with custom prompt, payment config endpoint, game board large numbers and turn indicator. All features passing.

minor.issue: Returns enabled:false and empty public_key as no PAYMENT_PUBLIC_KEY env var set — expected behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: GameContext selectedQuestions uses Set which is not JSON-serializable natively; the localStorage save uses JSON.stringify([...next]) which works correctly
CategorySelectPage toast message is 'هذه الفئة متاحة للمشتركين فقط!' (with exclamation) while requirement states 'هذه الفئة متاحة للمشتركين فقط' - minor difference, functionally correct
seed_data_creation: 10 premium categories + 150 premium questions already in DB via migrate endpoints (per context)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 improvements are implemented and tested. 20 categories (10 free + 10 premium locked) in DB. Admin at /admin with password hujjah2024. Game flow: home -> /setup -> /categories -> /game works end-to-end for guest users with auto-assigned trial categories.

test_results.premium_cats_locked_with_badge: PASS - 10 lock icons visible, 'Premium فقط' badges shown
test_results.locked_category_toast: PASS - 'هذه الفئة متاحة للمشتركين فقط!' toast shown
test_results.guest_can_start_game: PASS - ابدأ اللعبة button works, navigates to /game
test_results.turn_indicator_pulse: PASS - الحمر دوره shown at bottom with animation
test_results.admin_category_premium_checkbox: PASS - ⭐ فئة Premium checkbox in form
test_results.api_categories_20: PASS - 20 categories, 10 premium with is_premium field
